description: ingest produced at least one case
manifest joined at least one PDF

test_params: {"sql":"SELECT scorer FROM {table} ANTI JOIN name_rule_hits USING (scorer)"}
description: every declared name scorer must produce trace rows — a scorer that matches nothing (the whole-term-vs-token metaphone bug) is dead code an emptiness check cannot see
a UNION ALL BY NAME arm that lost its AS scorer nulls the discriminator silently
same for the token side — every trace row carries the rule that produced it
a box that is not a box is a canvas bug — validity via the bbox type's own operation, not x0/y0/x1/y1 unpacking

test_params: {"sql":"SELECT case_id FROM (SELECT case_id, bool_or(href = '/cases/' || case_id) AS lib, bool_or(href = '/cases/' || case_id || '/stream') AS stream, bool_or(href = '/cases/' || case_id || '/audit') AS audit FROM {table} GROUP BY case_id) WHERE NOT (lib AND stream AND audit)"}
description: every case exposes library, stream and audit in the nav shell
